Package com.rays.common

Interface BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>

Type Parameters:
T - type of entity extending BaseDTO
All Known Subinterfaces:
AttachmentServiceInt, CollegeServiceInt, CourseServiceInt, FacultyServiceInt, MarksheetServiceInt, RoleServiceInt, StudentServiceInt, SubjectServiceInt, TimeTableServiceInt, UserServiceInt
All Known Implementing Classes:
AttachmentServiceImpl, BaseServiceImpl, CollegeServiceImpl, CourseServiceImpl, FacultyServiceImpl, MarksheetServiceImpl, RoleServiceImpl, StudentServiceImpl, SubjectServiceImpl, TimeTableServiceImpl, UserServiceImpl
public interface BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>
Generic service interface providing business operations for all DTO entities.
Author:
Saket

    Modifier and Type

    Description

    add(T dto, UserContext userContext)
    Adds a new entity.

    Deletes entity by ID.

    Finds entity by primary key.

    Finds entity by unique attribute.

    Saves entity (add or update based on ID).

    search(T dto, UserContext userContext)
    Search without pagination.
